title: Interactive Canvas Orbit Field
topic: Build an interactive canvas orbit field with pointer response and pause controls.
prompt: Build an interactive canvas orbit field. Particles or satellites should orbit smoothly, respond to pointer movement, and expose a visible pause or resume control. The animation must honor prefers-reduced-motion by reducing or stopping automatic movement. Keep controls accessible and keep the canvas crisp across viewport sizes.
successCriteria: A canvas or equivalent animated surface renders nonblank pixels.
Frames differ over time when motion is allowed.
Pointer movement visibly affects the field.
A pause or resume control stops and restarts motion.
Reduced-motion users receive a static or heavily reduced animation.
